name: two_door_wall_cabinet

defaults.door_width_formula: respect hinge codo/reveal and front meeting reveals

notes: Default hinges are codo 0 with at least 3 mm reveal from the cabinet edge.
Use codo 9 with exactly 9 mm reveal when requested or when hinges mount on a divider shared by two hinged doors.
Use codo 18 for inset doors: door inside the carcass, flush to the front, 2 mm smaller than the inside opening.
Keep top crown alignment consistent with adjacent tall modules.
Record visible door edges in BOM metadata.
